body:
## Summary
- use `npx @zed-industries/codex-acp` for the acpx `--agent` override
- preserves relay `openai_base_url` and model injection

## Verification
- `npm run build && node --test dist/__tests__/acpx-adapter.test.js`
- `npm test`

## Context
After PR #6, acpx accepted the no-positional override form but could not spawn bare `codex-acp` on GitHub runner PATH. This mirrors acpx's built-in Codex launcher (`npx @zed-industries/codex-acp`) while adding the relay config args.
title: Use npx for Codex ACP relay override
